title: Fragment: Beauty's Halo.
content:
Thy beauty hangs around thee like
    Splendour around the moon -
    Thy voice, as silver bells that strike
    Upon
meaning:
"Fragment: Beauty's Halo." is a quintessential example of Percy Bysshe Shelley's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
